statement: PFDoDA's residual closes by enhancing the root membrane conductance (kappa_d).

confidence.basis: qualitative judge: Decisive: increasing the membrane conductance kappa_d 1x->5000x leaves PFDoDA root at ~1 vs 69 (unchanged). The GHK pathway is capped by anion exclusion -- the internal free conc ceiling is Cwo/e^N (e^N~107) independent of kappa_d -- so conductance cannot lift the long chain. Refuted.
